label: Fixture switches on and off correctly
instructions: Operate the assigned control and verify every fixture in this item turns on and off without an abnormal delay.

label: Fixture operates without flicker or unexpected shutdown
instructions: Observe the fixture at full output and after control changes. Note delayed starting, flicker, pulsing, intermittent operation or abnormal driver noise.

label: Light output and color appear consistent across the fixture group
instructions: Check for dead LEDs, dark sections, bright spots or visibly inconsistent color within fixtures of the same type.

label: Fixture is secure, aligned and free from visible damage
instructions: Inspect the housing, trim, lens, diffuser and visible accessories for damage, looseness, contamination or missing parts.

label: Exit sign is illuminated during normal operation
instructions: Verify the complete legend is illuminated evenly without dark letters, flicker or intermittent operation.

label: Legend and directional arrow are correct and clearly visible
instructions: Confirm the required face configuration and arrow direction match the egress drawings.

label: Exit sign is secure and free from visible damage
Each button responds correctly
Each programmed scene recalls the correct lighting state
instructions: Test every scene applicable to the space.

label: The controller operates only the intended lighting zones
Labels and indicator lights are correct and visible
Scene transitions are smooth and repeatable
instructions: Cycle through the scenes more than once and check for delayed response, flicker, missed fixtures or inconsistent levels.

label: Wall station switches the assigned lighting on and off
Raise and lower controls adjust the assigned lighting correctly
Lighting dims smoothly without flicker
The wall station controls only the intended lighting zones
ON button turns the assigned lighting zone on
instructions: Press ON once and verify the correct zone turns on to the approved level.

label: OFF button turns the assigned lighting zone off
instructions: Press OFF once and verify the correct zone turns off.

label: Raise button increases the assigned lighting level smoothly
instructions: Press and hold RAISE and verify the correct zone increases smoothly without affecting unrelated zones.

label: Lower button decreases the assigned lighting level smoothly
instructions: Press and hold LOWER and verify the correct zone decreases smoothly to the programmed minimum.

label: The wallstation controls only its assigned fixtures
instructions: Operate all buttons and confirm the intended fixtures respond while adjacent zones remain unchanged.

label: Button engraving, wallplate and mounting are correct and undamaged
instructions: Verify button labels match their programmed function and the station is secure, level and free from damage.

label: Combined sensor detects occupancy throughout its intended area
Electric lighting decreases as daylight increases and increases as daylight decreases
Photosensor controls only the intended daylight zone
Manual override and return to automatic control operate correctly
instructions: Change the zone from the associated wallstation, then verify automatic daylight control resumes at the approved vacancy, schedule or reset event.

label: Lighting fixtures in the zone respond to occupancy/motion
Lighting fixtures in the zone switch off when presence/motion absent
Labels and indicator lights operate correctly
PIR and ultrasonic detection indicators respond to movement
Sensor detects occupancy throughout the intended coverage area
Lighting follows the approved occupied sequence
instructions: Enter the space and verify automatic-on, partial-on or manual-on behavior matches the approved sequence of operation.

label: Lighting follows the approved vacancy sequence after the programmed delay
instructions: Leave the coverage area or remain still, then verify the zone dims or switches off after the configured delay.

label: Manual controls interact correctly with occupancy control
instructions: Operate the associated wallstation and verify manual on/off or level changes persist and reset according to the approved sequence.

label: Manual-on button operates the assigned lighting load
instructions: Press the wall-switch sensor button and verify the correct lighting load turns on.

label: Detected occupancy keeps the assigned load on
instructions: Move within the intended coverage area and verify the load remains on while occupancy is present.

label: The assigned load turns off after vacancy and the programmed delay
Sensor, lens, button and wallplate are secure and undamaged
instructions: Inspect the device for damage, loose mounting, obstructed lens or incorrect labeling.
